positive: A mystical and whimsical forest creature, a fox-like animal with glowing sapphire eyes and iridescent fur, curled up in a stylized, comfortable sleeping pose. The creature is surrounded by glowing bioluminescent mushrooms and delicate floating magical motes of light. The background is a deep twilight forest scene, rendered with strong, contrasted shadows and vibrant, saturated pops of cyan, sapphire blue, and emerald green. The style is clean vector illustration meets highly detailed fantasy artwork, suitable for a minimalist, aesthetically pleasing apparel print. Central composition, isolated subject, clean silhouette, high contrast, volumetric lighting.
negative: blurry, grainy, low resolution, text, watermark, signature, dirty, artifacts, messy, extra limbs, poorly rendered anatomy, noise, jpeg artifacts
